assertions.title: CI enforces lint before typecheck/test/build

steps.expected: Workflow contains a dedicated lint step running 'bun run lint' before Typecheck, Run test suite, and Build.
steps.observed: Workflow contains Install dependencies, Typecheck, Build, Run test suite, and Verify Docker build; no lint step is present.

steps.action: Run 'bun run lint' from repo root
steps.expected: Lint command exists and would gate CI if wired into the workflow.
steps.observed: Command exited 0 with 32 warnings and 0 errors, but the workflow does not invoke it.

commands: bun run lint -> exit 0 (32 warnings, 0 errors)
evidence.workingTree: Repository contains unrelated modified/untracked files, but command evidence was still feasible because lint is read-only for source validation.

assertions.issues: Required CI lint gate is missing from .github/workflows/test.yml, so CI cannot enforce lint before later steps.

assertions.title: Coverage threshold is non-zero and CI-gated

steps.expected: At least one coverage threshold is set to a positive value (>0).
steps.observed: Coverage thresholds are statements=0, branches=0, functions=0, lines=0.

steps.expected: Workflow runs a coverage-enforced test command such as 'bun run test -- --coverage'.
steps.observed: Workflow only runs 'bun run test' and does not invoke a coverage-mode test step.

steps.action: Run 'TMPDIR=/home/whoami/dev/opengecko/openGecko/data bun run test -- --coverage --maxWorkers=4' from repo root
steps.expected: Coverage-mode tests execute so coverage enforcement could fail the job if below threshold.
steps.observed: Command exited 1 immediately because dependency '@vitest/coverage-v8' is missing.

commands: TMPDIR=/home/whoami/dev/opengecko/openGecko/data bun run test -- --coverage --maxWorkers=4 -> exit 1 ('Cannot find dependency @vitest/coverage-v8')
evidence.workingTree: Existing unrelated working-tree changes did not block command execution; failure was due to missing coverage dependency and absent CI coverage gating.

assertions.issues: Coverage thresholds are all zero, CI does not run a coverage-mode command, and local coverage execution fails due to missing @vitest/coverage-v8.

frictions.description: The guidance file did not contain a dedicated 'Flow Validator Guidance: repo-quality-gates' section, so validation relied on mission guidance, the quality-gate assertions in validation-contract.md, and the task-specific instructions.
frictions.resolution: Used the available mission/testing guidance and inspected the workflow/config files directly.

summary: Tested 2 assertions on the repo-quality-gates surface: both failed. The CI workflow lacks a lint gate, and coverage is neither meaningfully thresholded nor enforced in CI; local coverage-mode tests also fail because @vitest/coverage-v8 is missing.
